tentang.title: About Labuha
tentang.description: PT Labuha Inter Nusa is a mining company that prioritizes excellence, safety, and the environment. Founded on September 16, 2021, PT Labuha Inter Nusa (Labuha) continues to grow rapidly in mineral and coal mining services as part of ABM Group. With a professional team of 611 people, we operate in Palu, Gorontalo, and other potential regions.

berita.title: News
berita.description: Read the latest news about PT Labuha Internusa

keberlanjutan.title: Sustainability
keberlanjutan.description: At Labuha, our commitment to excellence extends beyond mining operations, encompassing strict Occupational Health and Safety (OHS) standards, environmental conservation, and positive impact on communities.
